texto: Honestly, I like someone who is really grounded, super sweet, honest. I need them to have a sense of humor. I need them to laugh at what's funny, I need them to get jokes and be funny and be witty and sarcastic.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Casper Smart: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a humor. O trecho “Honestly, I like someone who is really grounded, super sweet, honest. I need them to have a sense…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que humor, funny, sweet pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de sweet e laugh.

frase_original: Honestly, I like someone who is really grounded, super sweet, honest. I need them to have a sense of humor. I need them to laugh at what's funny, I need them to get jokes and be funny and be witty and sarcastic.
